title: Pre-op anticoagulation documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports documenting anticoagulant use and clinician-assessed thrombotic and bleeding risk context without mapping hold, continue, bridge, medicine, or dose instructions.

source.title: 2024 AHA/ACC Perioperative CV Management Guideline: Key Points
source.population: Adults undergoing noncardiac surgery with cardiovascular disease, cardiovascular risk factors, or symptoms concerning for cardiovascular disease.
source.setting: Preoperative cardiovascular assessment and perioperative planning for noncardiac surgery.
source.exclusions: Exact for a stepwise clinician-led cardiovascular risk assessment, selective testing, team-based review, and anticoagulation risk context. It does not support automatic risk scores, tests, medicine changes, bridging, or doses, and UAE pathways remain local.

exact_location.heading: Key point 6 - therapeutic anticoagulation and individualized thrombotic or bleeding risk

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting anticoagulant use and clinician-assessed thrombotic and bleeding risk context without mapping hold, continue, bridge, medicine, or dose instructions.

assessment.text: Supports documenting anticoagulant use and clinician-assessed thrombotic and bleeding risk context without mapping hold, continue, bridge, medicine, or dose instructions.
assessment.rationale: The official ACC summary supports documenting therapeutic anticoagulation and clinician-assessed thrombotic and bleeding risk context, but not hold, continue, bridge, or dose instructions.

assessment.text: Supports review of medical, anesthesia, medicine, investigation, and consultation records relevant to anesthesia.
assessment.rationale: The ASA standard supports documenting review of current medical therapy and relevant records during preanesthesia assessment.

source.title: Basic Standards for Preanesthesia Care
source.population: Patients receiving anesthesia care, with emergency modification permitted.
source.exclusions: Exact for record review, patient interview, focused examination, previous anesthesia and medical therapy, risk-relevant physical condition, tests, consultations, consent, and documentation. UAE policy and emergency modifications remain local responsibilities.

exact_location.heading: Review of the available medical record

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports review of medical, anesthesia, medicine, investigation, and consultation records relevant to anesthesia.
